SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, YU LING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP $2,725.33 PRINCIPAL, $190.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,915.33, PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR STATUTORY DAMAGES PER CIVIL CODE 1950.5 IS DENIED.
